must_build.reason: every quarantined skill needs one before its first run
ensures no quarantined skill loads without a policy
outbound HTTP is the highest-risk surface

must_build.item: promotion-log.md writer with required reason field
must_build.reason: enforced by Ralph pass 2 governance addition

defer.until: operator reports policy authoring overhead exceeds five minutes per skill
defer.reason: explicit list is sufficient at current skill count

defer.until: any quarantined skill needs to run shell commands
defer.reason: filesystem and router cover existing skills

defer.until: any single skill ledger exceeds 1 MB
first observed ledger rewrite or rebase incident
defer.reason: single-operator workflow makes rebase low risk

delete.item: Background daemon for live observation streaming

future_hooks.rationale: outbound-http and shell will be added one surface per release
lets schema evolve without breaking older quarantined skills

scope_boundary: AIRLOCK is shipped when a freshly installed community skill can run, accumulate ledger entries, and be promoted via /airlock promote with no manual code edits to AccentOS itself.
